Title: [WIP] top up balance v2
Content:
Topping up your Xendit balance is how you add funds for payouts and other money-out transactions. It's important to know that top-ups are not for receiving payments from your customers.

How to top up

  1. On your Dashboard, go to Balance

  2. Click Top Up

  3. Select your preferred top-up method

  4. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the top-up

Always follow the top-up instructions carefully to prevent delays. Once you've made a transfer, you can check its status by going to Dashboard → Balance History and filtering by Top Up. Only successful top-ups will appear here, and you'll receive a confirmation email when the funds are credited.

Top-up methods

Below is a table with detailed information on each country's specific top-up methods, including processing times and any unique instructions.

Currency

Top-Up Method(s)

Processing Time

Notes

IDR

Virtual Account (VA)

Instant (same-bank)
≈ 5 min (inter-bank)

Not supported for LLG/RTGS networks. Find your VA on the Dashboard.

PHP

UBP Bills Payment (Recommended)

≤ 5 min, 24/7

Select "XENDIT BALANCE TOP-UP" as the biller.

Bank Transfer + Upload

Varies by method (5 min - 3-5 business days)

Processed weekdays 9:00 - 18:00 GMT+8.

MYR

Bank Transfer + Upload

Processed weekdays 9:00 - 18:00 GMT+8

After-hours requests are processed by 12:00 the next business day.

THB

Bank Transfer + Upload

Processed weekdays 9:00 - 16:30 GMT+7

Confirmation email is sent on credit.

VND

Bank Transfer + Upload

≤ 500M VND: Instant
> 500M VND: 30 min (Mon-Fri 8:30 - 16:00)

USD to your balance currency

SWIFT Bank Transfer + Upload

Processed weekdays, 9am-4:30pm GMT+8

Topping up with foreign currency

If you need to add funds to your Xendit account from a foreign currency account, you have two main options.

Option 1: Foreign Currency Top-Up (USD to Local Balance)

This method is for funding your local balance directly from a USD account. With this option, you get to approve the exchange rate before the money is converted.

How it works:

  1. Send a USD wire transfer to the designated Xendit bank account for your region

  2. Email help@xendit.co with your proof of transfer, the USD amount, and your business name

  3. Our team will send you a real-time exchange rate quote via email or WhatsApp. You must approve this quote within 24 hours.

  4. Once approved, the funds will be converted and credited to your local balance

Option 2: Cross-Border Top-Up to an IDR Balance

This method is used when you want to top up your IDR balance from a foreign currency account. You have two ways to do this:

Method

How to transfer

Foreign exchange & settlement

Auto-converted

Send foreign currency to your dedicated IDR Top-up Virtual Account

The foreign exchange rate is determined by the bank and the funds are automatically converted and credited.

Manual Foreign Exchange

Send a USD wire transfer to the BNI USD account.

Email help@xendit.co to lock in a specific exchange rate before the funds are converted.

OLD ARTICLE:

DO NOT PUBLISH

This article is being updated to include regional content

Purpose — Add funds for disbursements and other money-out transactions.
Limitation — Top-ups cannot be used to receive payments from customers.

Universal Flow

  1. Open Dashboard → Balance

  2. Click Top Up and choose your country method

  3. Follow on-screen steps and send the transfer. Failure to follow all of the funding instructions may result in delays in processing your top up

Processing time varies by network, currency, and country (see FAQs).

IDR Balance

Instant Top-Up (IDR) via Dedicated VA

  • Each account has a Top-Up Virtual Account (VA)

  • Transfer IDR from any bank:

    • Same-bank – instant

    • Inter-bank – ≈ 5 min (LLG/RTGS not supported)

  • Find your VA in Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Select Bank

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up (same-bank usually ≤ 5 min). Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

FAQ

Top-up not showing?

• Use an instant network (not LLG/RTGS).
• If funds bounced, email help@xendit.co with proof.

Can I get a VA at another bank?

Yes — request one for BNI, BRI, BSS, or Permata.

PHP Balance

Xendit supports two automated funding routes.

UBP Bills Payment (recommended)

Posts in ≤ 5 min, 24 × 7.

  1. Open Pay Bills (UBP Online) or Bills Payment (UBP Portal)

  2. Select biller “XENDIT BALANCE TOP-UP”

  3. Enter your payment code (Dashboard → Balance → Top Up)

  4. Enter amount → Pay

Bank Transfer + Upload

Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Bank Transfer
Upload transfer details and slip; processed weekdays 09:00-18:00 GMT+8.

Service-Level Matrix (PHP → PHP Balance)

Method

Cut-off

Credited*

UBP Bills Payment

Any time

≤ 5 min

Same-bank transfer

Any time

5 – 10 min

InstaPay ≤ PHP 50 k

Any time

5 – 10 min

PESONet

≤ 15:00

By 19:00 same day

PESONet

> 15:00

By 12:00 next biz day

Cash / Check OTC

Bank SLA

3 – 5 banking days

International wire

—

3 – 7 banking days

*During support hours 09:00-18:00 PHT, weekdays.

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up. Email notice is sent once credited. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

FAQ

When will my top-up arrive?

If beyond the SLA above, email help@xendit.ph.

MYR Balance

Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Bank Transfer
Upload transfer details and slip; processed weekdays 09:00-18:00 GMT+8.
After-hours requests post by 12:00 next day if funds are in.

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up. Email notice is sent once credited. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

THB Balance

Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Bank Transfer
Upload transfer details and slip; processed weekdays 09:00-16:30 GMT+7.

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up. Email notice is sent once credited. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

VND Balance

Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Bank Transfer

  • ≤ 500 M VND – instant credit

  • > 500 M VND – processed Mon-Fri 08:30-16:00; credit ≤ 30 min once funds arrive

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up. Email notice is sent once credited. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

USD Balance

Dashboard → Balance → Top Up → Bank Transfer
Upload transfer details and slip; processed weekdays 09:00-16:30 GMT+8.

Check Status

Dashboard → Balance History → filter Top Up. Email notice is sent once credited. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

Foreign-Currency Top-Up (USD → local balance)

Use when funding from a foreign-currency account. Xendit quotes the FX rate before credit.

1 · Send USD

Entity

Account name

Account #

Indonesia

BNI

PT Sinar Digital Terdepan

598 894 948

2 · Notify Customer Success

Email help@xendit.co with:
• Proof of transfer • USD amount • Registered business name

3 · Approve FX Quote

CS sends the real-time rate (email/WhatsApp). Confirm within 24 h.

4 · Credit

After approval, Xendit converts and credits your balance. Confirmation email follows. Only successful top ups are displayed - you will not see a pending top up on your dashboard.

Cross-Border Top-Up to IDR Balance

Option

How to transfer

FX & settlement

Send foreign currency to your Top-Up VA

Bank sets the FX rate

Manual FX

Wire USD to the BNI USD account above

Email help@xendit.co to lock a rate
